text.title: feedback-management Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for feedback-management as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Enhancement becomes a black hole for uncategorized items. Force "bug" when verbatim contains "broken", "can't", "fails". Force specific topic or reject with request for taxonomy update.

failure-mode.description: Sending raw feedback verbatim with emails or account IDs to LLM provider.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: PII in LLM calls may violate GDPR DPA. Strip emails, phone numbers, account IDs with a regex pre-pass or dedicated scrubber agent before any LLM call.

failure-mode.description: Using raw vote counts from Canny or Productboard as prioritization input.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Vote count correlates poorly with retention impact. One churned enterprise customer who never voted matters more than 50 free users who all voted.

failure-mode.description: Promoting a feedback cluster to roadmap item without human review of the decision.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Feedback volume may reflect vocal minority, not majority pain. Human checkpoint before roadmap promotion prevents shipping for the wrong users.
